summary: Iteration 200: Tested PO Auto-Retry Queue feature - all 26 backend tests passed. Verified POST /api/readiness/po-pending/park (parks PO-gap docs, returns parked count, retry_interval_hours=4, max_wait_days=3, max_retries=18), POST /api/readiness/po-pending/retry (re-evaluates parked docs, returns resolved/still_pending/escalated_to_exception/errors counts), GET /api/readiness/po-pending (returns PO pending queue with total and documents array), POST /api/readiness/sync-status (force cleanup still works), GET /api/readiness/exception-queue (exception queue still works), GET /api/aliases/vendors/search-bc?q=ware (vendor search still works), and verified po_pending workflow_status is excluded from main inbox queue view.
critical_code_review_comments: readiness.py lines 950-1044: POST /api/readiness/po-pending/park correctly finds PO-gap docs using multiple detection methods (readiness.warning_reasons=po_missing, validation_results.checks with po_validation/po_check failed, readiness.blocking_reasons regex po), excludes batch_parent and auto_cleared docs, sets po_pending_parked=True, po_pending_retry_count=0, po_pending_max_retries=18, workflow_status=po_pending

readiness.py lines 1047-1157: POST /api/readiness/po-pending/retry correctly re-evaluates all parked docs using evaluate_and_persist(), resolves if po_resolved signal or is_ready status, escalates to Exception Queue after max_retries (18), updates retry counts and timestamps

readiness.py lines 1160-1185: GET /api/readiness/po-pending correctly returns {total, documents} with pagination (skip, limit), includes PO-specific fields (po_pending_retry_count, po_pending_max_retries, po_pending_parked_at, po_pending_next_retry, po_pending_last_retry)
documents.py line 275: DONE_WORKFLOW_STATUSES correctly includes 'po_pending' to exclude PO pending docs from main inbox queue view

server.py lines 7624-7737: Background scheduler _po_retry_scheduler runs every 4 hours, auto-parks new PO-gap docs, retries pending docs with full readiness re-evaluation, escalates to Exception Queue after 18 retries (3 days)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has minimal PO-gap docs (all cleaned up by previous force cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 200 verified PO Auto-Retry Queue feature. Key findings: (1) POST /api/readiness/po-pending/park returns {parked, retry_interval_hours=4, max_wait_days=3, max_retries=18, details, message} - parks docs with po_missing warning, po_validation/po_check failed, or blocking_reasons containing 'po'. (2) POST /api/readiness/po-pending/retry returns {total_checked, resolved, still_pending, escalated_to_exception, errors, details, message} - runs full readiness re-evaluation via evaluate_and_persist(), resolves if po_resolved or is_ready, escalates after 18 retries. (3) GET /api/readiness/po-pending returns {total, documents} with pagination - documents include po_pending_retry_count, po_pending_max_retries, po_pending_parked_at, po_pending_next_retry, po_pending_last_retry. (4) Background scheduler in server.py runs every 4h, auto-parks new PO-gap docs and retries pending ones. (5) po_pending workflow_status is correctly excluded from main inbox queue view via DONE_WORKFLOW_STATUSES in documents.py. Preview environment has 0 PO-gap docs because all were cleaned up by previous force cleanup operations.
